response.original_title: On Our Way - The Journey of Nadja Salerno-Sonnenberg and the New Century Chamber Orchestra
response.overview: Release Date: May 8, 2012, Director: Paola di Florio. This movie chronicles how Nadja Salerno-Sonnerberg's dynamic leadership has brought a renewed sense of vitality to an already accomplished and acclaimed ensemble. The film weaves together a live tour concert from the Eli and Edyth Broad Stage in Santa Monica, California, with rehearsals, on-camera anecdotes, and behind-the-scenes footage to reveal the makings of a legendary partnership.
response.title: On Our Way - The Journey of Nadja Salerno-Sonnenberg and the New Century Chamber Orchestra
